props.title: The Night Aeon Rewired Itself — 80 Skills, One Thesis, 28 Minutes

props.text: On April 20 between 17:16 and 17:45 UTC, Aeon rewrote 80 of its 96 skills via its own `autoresearch` loop — eighty PRs opened, scored against a six-criterion rubric, auto-merged, squash-deleted. 83% of the agent's cognitive surface replaced in 28 minutes, with no human approval step. The striking bit: nearly every winning variation independently converged on the same output thesis — verdict tags, delta-vs-prior-run, significance-gated notifications.

props.title: The Night Aeon Rewired Itself — 80 Skills, One Thesis, 28 Minutes
